relations.note: Emphasis colors reinforce the hero statistic in statistical callouts.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Keep charts visually consistent and scannable within the brand system.
rules.rule_text: Charts must be clean and easy to scan, consistent with the system: the container uses uniform rounded corners (chart.container.radius = 12px), a Light Blue (chart.container.fill = #E6F0F9) panel, and a Brand Blue (chart.header.fill = #00529b) rounded header bar.

effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points only
effect.subject: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a)

quotes: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.**

rules.intent: Reserve warm accent colors for data emphasis so key figures stand out.
rules.rule_text: Chart color logic: Brand Blue (chart.data.color = #00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) are dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator data uses neutral gray.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Convey an approachable brand feel in data visualizations.
rules.rule_text: Bars and chart icons must use rounded, approachable shapes (e.g. rounded bar tops).

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Maintain a consistent chart headline treatment across print and email.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines set in Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS (chart.headline.case = all_caps), Brand Blue (chart.headline.color = #00529b), with a thin Gold rule beneath (chart.headline.rule_color = #ffc60a).

quotes: Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.

rules.intent: Make the key statistic the visual hero with clear supporting hierarchy.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callouts must present the % figure large and bold as the hero, with supporting copy in a lighter weight (chart.statistical_callout.supporting_text.weight = lighter weight) beneath.

quotes: Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Keep footnotes legible but visually subordinate to and distinct from primary data.
rules.rule_text: Chart footnotes must be noticeably smaller and clearly separated from the primary data.
